projects.title: FUJIN VTOL Aircraft
projects.description: Complete VTOL aircraft design from inception to second prototype testing, achieving 25% flight time improvement and streamlined manufacturing process.
achievements: Spearheaded complete design cycle from inception to prototype testing
Achieved 25% improvement in flight time performance
Reduced prototype design to completion time by 1.5 weeks
Engineered EPP foam machining solution reducing costs by 10%
Optimized aerodynamic performance to CL=0.428

projects.title: Wearable Ring Mouse
projects.description: IoT-enabled wearable ring mouse with Arduino Nano 33 BLE, enabling click, cursor movement, and scroll functionalities with custom 3D-printed housing.
achievements: Integrated push button, IMU, and Hall effect sensors in ring form factor
Created custom firmware for sensor data processing and BLE communication
Designed and 3D-printed custom PLA ring and wrist modules
Achieved SUS score of 35.67 through user testing with 3 volunteers
Implemented gesture recognition for swipe-to-tab functionality

projects.title: UR5 Robot Vision & Assembly
projects.description: Computer vision-based tool sorting and automated flashlight assembly using UR5 cobot with CNN-based object recognition and precise manipulation.
achievements: Developed CNN using TensorFlow/Keras for tool identification
Implemented 6DoF pose estimation using OpenCV and ArUco markers
Programmed multi-step flashlight assembly with pneumatic chuck control
Integrated force-torque sensor for precise screwing operations (2Nm torque)
Applied homogeneous transformations for precise manipulation

projects.title: Real-Time 3D Reconstruction
projects.description: Custom stereo camera system for real-time 3D reconstruction using Raspberry Pi and OpenCV with sub-3ms processing time.
achievements: Designed custom stereo camera using Raspberry Pi Zero 2W
Achieved real-time 3D reconstruction within 3 milliseconds
Camera calibration with 0.2 RMSE error using checkerboard patterns
Implemented Semi-Global Block Matching for depth estimation
Generated 3D point clouds using Open3D library

projects.title: Fruit Classification — ResNet18
projects.description: Deep learning model for classifying 5 fruit categories using ResNet18 and transfer learning with comprehensive data augmentation. Achieved 97.5% validation accuracy.
achievements: Achieved 99% training accuracy and 97.5% validation accuracy
Applied data augmentation including rotation, flipping, and zooming
Combined Fruits-262 and Fruits-360 datasets with custom test data

projects.title: SAE Aero Design Aircraft
projects.description: Led design team for SAE Aero Design competition. Self-gliding aircraft with autonomous landing, 45% cost reduction.
achievements: Developed self-gliding aircraft with 30cm wingspan and autonomous landing
Reduced material costs by 45% through alternative material research
Tested four aircraft prototypes to determine performance limits

projects.title: Fruit / Vegetable Plucking Robot
projects.description: Automated strawberry harvesting robot with RGB vision-based detection and gantry-style movement with scissor gripper.
achievements: Implemented RGB color segmentation for strawberry detection
Programmed Arduino-controlled gantry robot mechanism
Achieved wireless communication via Bluetooth for coordinate transmission

projects.title: 3D Object Reconstruction with VGGT & YOLO
projects.description: 3D reconstruction pipeline using Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT) to generate dense point clouds from 2D imagery, with YOLO and SAM for real-time object segmentation.
achievements: Engineered pipeline leveraging VGGT to generate dense 3D point clouds from 2D input imagery
Integrated YOLO and SAM for real-time object detection and segmentation to isolate regions of interest
Validated on custom datasets with high-fidelity depth maps and point cloud representations
